hero.subtitle: Whether you're a student, developer, or tech enthusiast, MSK TECH is here to help you learn, build, and grow.

whoAreWe.title: Who Are We?
whoAreWe.description: MSK TECH is a platform that helps students and future professionals learn technology through practical projects and real experience.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript and modern frameworks like React and Vue to create interactive, responsive websites.

items.title: Mobile Development
items.description: Learn to design and develop native and cross-platform apps with React Native and Flutter.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: Create intuitive and aesthetic interfaces by mastering Figma, design principles and user experience.

items.title: Fullstack & MVP
items.description: Become a full-stack developer capable of handling frontend, backend, databases and deployment.

items.title: AI & Machine Learning
items.description: Dive into machine learning, deep learning and LLMs to build intelligent solutions.

items.title: Data Science & Analysis
items.description: Analyze, visualize and interpret data to make informed decisions using Python and its libraries.

whatYouGain.title: What You'll Gain
whatYouGain.quote: The best way to predict your future is to build it.

ourTeam.heading: One Team, Many Expertises
ourTeam.description: MSK TECH brings together a multidisciplinary team: modern web development, mobile apps, solid databases, and cybersecurity to protect every project from the first screen to the last line of code.
